title: linaria iconia
intro: Linaria iconia, also known as the Toadflax or Butter and Eggs, is a plant species that belongs to the figwort family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. Traditionally, Linaria iconia has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Linaria iconia include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Linaria iconia is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
